sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_decimal (id INT, value DECIMAL(18, 3));
INSERT INTO test_decimal (id, value) VALUES (1, DECIMAL(1234.567));
UPDATE test_decimal SET value = DECIMAL(987.654) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value * DECIMAL(2.000) AS doubled_value FROM test_decimal;
DELETE FROM test_decimal WHERE value < DECIMAL(1000.000);
